stack: Vite+React+TS+Tailwind (web/) | Express+TS (api/) | Claude API (Sonnet 4.6) | vitest + in-memory SQLite
completionRule: passes flips to true only after all 4 gates pass in both web/ and api/. If any gate fails, debug and fix before continuing.

conventions.api: Express Router; validation middleware before handler; rate-limit middleware first; errors as { error: string, code: number }
conventions.tests: vitest; in-memory SQLite for DB mocks; afterEach cleanup in every test file
conventions.ts: no `any`; always await DB ops; strict mode on

tasks.title: Scaffold split-stack repo (web/ + api/)
acceptanceCriteria: web/: Vite + React + TS + Tailwind, strict mode, ESLint, vitest configured
api/: Express + TS, ts-node-dev, ESLint, vitest, in-memory SQLite test helper
Rate-limit middleware mounted first on api/ Express app
api/ exposes GET /api/health on a Router returning { ok: true }
Root package.json with `dev` script running both apps concurrently
Each app has typecheck/lint/test/build scripts
web/ landing route renders and successfully calls /api/health through CORS
All 4 verification gates pass in both web/ and api/

tasks.title: Build landing page with URL + sector input (PRD F1)
acceptanceCriteria: Single-screen form: URL field + sector dropdown
Sector taxonomy from PRD (B2B SaaS, CPG, Climate Tech, Health, Fintech, E-Commerce, Media)
Client-side URL validation
Submits to api/ /api/snapshot and routes to results screen
All 4 verification gates pass

tasks.title: Implement POST /api/parse-url Express route
acceptanceCriteria: Mounted on Express Router; validation middleware runs before handler
Returns { title, metaDescription, h1, bodySample } from a fetched homepage (cheerio)
Errors return { error, code }; invalid/unreachable URL → 400
vitest test with mocked fetch + afterEach cleanup
All 4 verification gates pass

tasks.title: Implement POST /api/snapshot Express route (PRD F2)
acceptanceCriteria: Mounted on Express Router; validation middleware before handler
Composes parsed URL signals + sector into Claude prompt
Returns { stage, competitors[3-5], positioning } via Claude tool-use structured output
Uses claude-sonnet-4-6 with prompt caching on system prompt
Returns within 15s for valid inputs (PRD S1)
vitest test with mocked Claude client + afterEach cleanup
All 4 verification gates pass
tasks.notes: Live Claude API verification deferred to US-008 — needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY in api/.env. Gates green; route plumbing verified via mocked unit tests.

tasks.title: Build design action selection screen (PRD F3)
acceptanceCriteria: Renders market snapshot from US-004 above the action menu
All 8 design actions from PRD selectable as cards
Selection submits to /api/roi
All 4 verification gates pass

tasks.title: Implement POST /api/roi Express route (PRD F4)
acceptanceCriteria: Mounted on Express Router; validation middleware before handler
Returns { projectionRange, caseStudy, shortTermImpact, longTermImpact, confidence }
Sector-specific (different sectors yield different output — verifies PRD S2)
Returns one real-named case study with source attribution
Flags low confidence when signal is thin
vitest test with mocked Claude client + afterEach cleanup
All 4 verification gates pass
tasks.notes: Built with auto-fallback: when ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set, uses Claude (sonnet-4-6, prompt-cached system, tool-use structured output). When key is missing, falls back to sector-aware stub data (different projections per sector via SECTOR_MODIFIERS). Live Claude verification deferred to US-008.

tasks.title: Build ROI output screen with paywall prompt
acceptanceCriteria: Renders projection range, case study citation, short vs long-term split
Non-interruptive paywall CTA: 'See full report'
Loading and error states handled
All 4 verification gates pass

tasks.title: End-to-end smoke test in preview
acceptanceCriteria: Both servers start via root `npm run dev`
Browser preview: full flow runs (URL → snapshot → action → ROI)
No console errors
Two different sectors produce different ROI output (PRD S2)
All 4 verification gates pass in both web/ and api/
